---
title: "Comparing co-complaint networks reveals distinct structures across police departments"
description: 'Poster'
author: "Will Asinger, Mia (Cong) Wang, Claire Kelling, Alex Wiedemann, Ariana Mendible"
date: "5/28/2026"
categories: [network, complaints, publications]
image: network_radar_chart.png
page-layout: full
freeze: false
---

The following poster was presented by Will Asinger and Mia Wang at the [2026 ASA Midwest Regional Conference in Statistics and Data Science](https://irsa.umn.edu/events/2026-asa-midwest-regional-conference-statistics-and-data-science), winning the Graduate Student Poster Award!

```{=html}
<iframe src="asa_midwest_sds_2026.pdf" 
        width="100%" 
        height="100%">
</iframe>
```
